message.content:
Fix TypeScript errors in the AstroLab mobile app screens. Read each file before editing.

The actual shared types (in `@astrolab/shared`) have these field names:
- **LoyaltyCard**: `total_points`, `total_stamps`, `stamps_current_card`, `cards_completed` (NO `card_type`, NO `current_stamps`, NO `current_points`)
- **Scan**: `points_earned`, `stamps_earned`, `scanned_at` (NO `stamps_added`, NO `points_added`, NO `created_at`)
- **Reward**: `is_active`, `points_required`, `stamps_required`, `reward_type` (NO `is_redeemed`, NO `redeemed_at`)

The actual component props:
- **LoyaltyCardMobile** expects: `merchantName: string, logoUrl?: string | null, loyaltyType: 'points' | 'stamps' | 'both', totalPoints: number, stampsCurrentCard: number, stampsPerCard: number, merchantId: string, onPress: () => void` (NOT a `card` prop)
- **StampsGridMobile** expects: `total: number, filled: number, size?: number` (NOT `current` and `max`)
- **CircularProgress** expects: `progress: number (0-1), size?: number, strokeWidth?: number, color?: string, label?: string` (NOT `current` and `max`)

## Fix 1: `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\(tabs)\index.tsx`

a) Fix LoyaltyCardMobile usage — change from `<LoyaltyCardMobile card={item} />` to passing individual props:
```tsx
<LoyaltyCardMobile
  merchantName={(item as any).merchants?.name ?? 'Magasin'}
  logoUrl={(item as any).merchants?.logo_url}
  loyaltyType={(item as any).merchants?.loyalty_type ?? 'stamps'}
  totalPoints={item.total_points}
  stampsCurrentCard={item.stamps_current_card}
  stampsPerCard={(item as any).merchants?.stamps_required ?? 10}
  merchantId={item.merchant_id}
  onPress={() => router.push(`/(tabs)/cards/${item.id}`)}
/>
```
Note: remove the outer `<Pressable>` wrapper since LoyaltyCardMobile has its own `onPress`.

b) Fix Badge usage — change from `<Badge variant="success">A recuperer</Badge>` to `<Badge variant="success" label="A recuperer" />` 

c) Fix Scan field names:
- `scan.stamps_added` → `scan.stamps_earned`
- `scan.points_added` → `scan.points_earned`
- `scan.created_at` → `scan.scanned_at`

d) Fix Reward field names in the rewards section. `reward.created_at` should use a different field. Since Reward in the shared type has `created_at`, this should be fine. But `reward.description` might be `null`. Add null coalescing if needed.

## Fix 2: `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\(tabs)\cards\index.tsx`

Fix LoyaltyCardMobile usage — same pattern as above. Change from `<LoyaltyCardMobile card={item} />` to individual props. Remove outer `<Pressable>` wrapper since the component has `onPress`.

```tsx
renderItem={({ item }) => (
  <LoyaltyCardMobile
    merchantName={(item as any).merchants?.name ?? 'Magasin'}
    logoUrl={(item as any).merchants?.logo_url}
    loyaltyType={(item as any).merchants?.loyalty_type ?? 'stamps'}
    totalPoints={item.total_points}
    stampsCurrentCard={item.stamps_current_card}
    stampsPerCard={(item as any).merchants?.stamps_required ?? 10}
    merchantId={item.merchant_id}
    onPress={() => router.push(`/(tabs)/cards/${item.id}`)}
  />
)}
```

## Fix 3: `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\(tabs)\cards\[cardId].tsx`

a) Remove `card_type` check — use merchant's loyalty_type instead:
Change `const isStamps = card?.card_type === 'stamps' || merchant?.loyalty_type === 'stamps';`
To `const isStamps = merchant?.loyalty_type === 'stamps' || merchant?.loyalty_type === 'both';`

b) Change `card.current_stamps` → `card.stamps_current_card`
Change `card.current_points` → `card.total_points`

c) Fix StampsGridMobile: change `<StampsGridMobile current={currentStamps} max={maxStamps} />` to `<StampsGridMobile filled={currentStamps} total={maxStamps} />`

d) Fix CircularProgress: change `<CircularProgress current={currentPoints} max={rewardThreshold} size={160} label={...} />` to `<CircularProgress progress={currentPoints / rewardThreshold} size={160} label={...} />`

e) Fix Badge for rewards: change `<Badge variant={r.is_redeemed ? ...}>` to use `r.is_active`:
```tsx
<Badge variant={r.is_active ? 'success' : 'neutral'} label={r.is_active ? 'Disponible' : 'Inactive'} />
```

f) Fix Scan field names: `s.created_at` → `s.scanned_at`, `s.stamps_added` → `s.stamps_earned`, `s.points_added` → `s.points_earned`

## Fix 4: `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\(tabs)\profile\history.tsx`

Fix Scan field names:
- `item.created_at` → `item.scanned_at`
- `item.stamps_added` → `item.stamps_earned`
- `item.points_added` → `item.points_earned`

Read every file first before editing!

content.text: I'll start by reading all four files that need to be fixed.

data.command: callback
callback
callback
callback

Fix (tabs)/cards/[cardId].tsx - card_type, field names, component props, Badge, Scan fields
Fix (tabs)/profile/history.tsx - Scan field names

content.text: Now I have all four files read. Let me apply all the fixes. I'll start with Fix 1 for the dashboard index.tsx.

data.command: FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE"; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]]; then RESULT=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "TypeScript errors found: $RESULT" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]] && grep -q 'import \* from' "$FILE"; then echo 'Warning: Avoid wildcard imports for better tree-shaking' >&2; exit 2; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ && "$FILE" != *".test."* && "$FILE" != *".spec."* ]]; then DIR=$(dirname "$FILE"); BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE" | sed -E 's/\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$//'); for TEST_FILE in "$DIR/$BASENAME.test."* "$DIR/$BASENAME.spec."*; do if [ -f "$TEST_FILE" ]; then echo "Running tests for $TEST_FILE..."; if command -v jest >/dev/null 2>&1; then npx jest "$TEST_FILE" --passWithNoTests; elif command -v vitest >/dev/null 2>&1; then npx vitest run "$TEST_FILE"; fi; break; fi; done; fi
callback

content.text:
All four files are verified and correct. Here is a summary of every change made across the four files:

---

## Fix 1: `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\(tabs)\index.tsx`

**a) LoyaltyCardMobile usage (lines 131-141)** -- Replaced `<Pressable><LoyaltyCardMobile card={item} /></Pressable>` with individual props passed directly to `LoyaltyCardMobile`, including `merchantName`, `logoUrl`, `loyaltyType`, `totalPoints`, `stampsCurrentCard`, `stampsPerCard`, `merchantId`, and `onPress`. The outer `<Pressable>` wrapper was removed since the component has its own `onPress`.

**b) Badge usage (line 159)** -- Changed from `<Badge variant="success">A recuperer</Badge>` (children-based) to `<Badge variant="success" label="A recuperer" />` (label prop).

**c) Scan field names (lines 179-184)** -- Fixed three field references:
- `scan.stamps_added` -> `scan.stamps_earned`
- `scan.points_added` -> `scan.points_earned`
- `scan.created_at` -> `scan.scanned_at`

**d) Supabase query order (line 55)** -- Changed `.order('created_at', ...)` to `.order('scanned_at', ...)` for the scans query.

---

## Fix 2: `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\(tabs)\cards\index.tsx`

**LoyaltyCardMobile usage (lines 57-68)** -- Same pattern as Fix 1a. Replaced `<Pressable><LoyaltyCardMobile card={item} /></Pressable>` with individual props. Removed the outer `<Pressable>` wrapper.

---

## Fix 3: `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\(tabs)\cards\[cardId].tsx`

**a) `card_type` removal (line 71)** -- Changed `card?.card_type === 'stamps' || merchant?.loyalty_type === 'stamps'` to `merchant?.loyalty_type === 'stamps' || merchant?.loyalty_type === 'both'`.

**b) Card field names (lines 73-74)** -- Changed `card?.current_stamps` to `card?.stamps_current_card` and `card?.current_points` to `card?.total_points`.

**c) StampsGridMobile props (line 125)** -- Changed `<StampsGridMobile current={...} max={...} />` to `<StampsGridMobile filled={...} total={...} />`.

**d) CircularProgress props (lines 132-136)** -- Changed from `current`/`max` props to a single `progress` prop computed as a 0-1 ratio: `progress={rewardThreshold > 0 ? currentPoints / rewardThreshold : 0}`.

**e) Badge for rewards (line 159)** -- Changed from `r.is_redeemed`-based logic with children to `r.is_active`-based logic with label prop: `<Badge variant={r.is_active ? 'success' : 'neutral'} label={r.is_active ? 'Disponible' : 'Inactive'} />`.

**f) Scan field names (lines 174, 177)** -- Changed `s.created_at` to `s.scanned_at`, `s.stamps_added` to `s.stamps_earned`, `s.points_added` to `s.points_earned`.

**g) Supabase query order (line 46)** -- Changed `.order('created_at', ...)` to `.order('scanned_at', ...)` for the scans query.

---

## Fix 4: `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\(tabs)\profile\history.tsx`

**a) Supabase query order (line 18)** -- Changed `.order('created_at', ...)` to `.order('scanned_at', ...)`.

**b) Scan field names (lines 59, 69)** -- Changed `item.created_at` to `item.scanned_at`, `item.stamps_added` to `item.stamps_earned`, and `item.points_added` to `item.points_earned`.
